Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Text: Complexity Low cases 2001 and 2004 Medium case 2002 High cases 2003 and 2005 Indeed high complexity leads to longer durations cases 2003 and 2005 Medium also leads to longer than low

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It appears that high complexity leads to more loops of Request Additional Documents and longer times

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Region A cases 2001 and 2003 Region B cases 2002 2004 and 2005 Region B appears for longer cases 2002 and 2005 Region A also has case 2003 long though

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Region B is likely more impacted Could be that region B processes or support staff is slower

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Resource Adjuster Lisa appears in cases 2002 and 2005 Adjuster Mike handles 2003 Manager Bill handles 2003 and 2005

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Resource constraints limited senior adjusters and managers causing backlog Adjuster Lisa may have less experience with high complexity claims leading to more document requests Manager Bill also took longer to approve high complexity

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The claim process includes a loop for Request Additional Documents The number of loops appears not bounded This might be due to incomplete documentation being requested and the claimant not responding quickly causing wait time

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Root causes High complexity leads to repeated requests for additional documents and longer evaluation times Resource shortage or overload may exist for specific adjusters and managers Region B may have operational constraints

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The data shows that for high complexity cases the Request Additional Documents step repeats multiple times This is a key root cause

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Implement a triage at intake to assign complexity allocate more resources experienced adjusters and senior managers to high complexity claims from the start reducing need for multiple document requests

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Ensure adjusters especially those handling region B have enough bandwidth consider cross training or adding temporary staff Use workload balancing to avoid bottlenecks for specific adjusters

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Investigate why Region B has longer times implement regional performance dashboards standardize document request templates integrate with external systems for faster retrieval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use an automated system to track outstanding documents send reminders and expedite responses implement a maximum number of requests before escalation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Create KPIs average case duration by region complexity and resource identify outliers like case 2005 2003 and 2002 for root cause analysis
